text: What happened to the boys in the night?
zh: 夜里男孩们发生了什么事？

text: Late in the afternoon, the boys put up their tent in the middle of a field.
zh: 傍晚时分，男孩们在一片田野中间搭起了帐篷。

text: As soon as this was done, they cooked a meal over an open fire.
zh: 刚搭好帐篷，他们就用篝火做了一顿饭。

text: They were all hungry and the food smelled good.
zh: 他们都饿了，食物闻起来很香。

text: After a wonderful meal, they told stories and sang songs by the campfire.
zh: 饱餐一顿后，他们围坐在篝火旁讲故事、唱歌。

text: But some time later it began to rain.
zh: 但过了一会儿，天开始下雨了。

text: The boys felt tired so they put out the fire and crept into their tent.
zh: 男孩们觉得累了，便熄灭了篝火，钻进了帐篷。

text: Their sleeping bags were warm and comfortable, so they all slept soundly.
zh: 他们的睡袋既温暖又舒适，所以大家都睡得很香。

text: In the middle of the night, two boys woke up and began shouting.
zh: 半夜，两个男孩醒来并开始大喊。

text: The tent was full of water!
They all leapt out of their sleeping bags and hurried outside.
zh: 他们纷纷跳出睡袋，匆忙跑到外面。

text: It was raining heavily and they found that a stream had formed in the field.
zh: 雨下得很大，他们发现田野里已经形成了一条小溪。

text: The stream wound its way across the field and then flowed right under their tent!
zh: 这条小溪蜿蜒穿过田野，然后正好从他们的帐篷下面流过！
